data.name: Uncommon Network Connection Initiated By Certutil.EXE

dst_agent_hostname ~= ".*steamcommunity.com" OR  dst_agent_hostname ~= ".*storage.googleapis.com" OR  dst_agent_hostname ~= ".*technet.microsoft.com" OR  dst_agent_hostname ~= ".*temp.sh" OR "C:\\Users\\.*") AND (actor_process_image_path ~= ".*\\AppData\\Local\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe")) OR ((actor_process_image_path IN ("C:\Program Files\Mozilla Firefox\firefox.exe", "C:\Program Files (x86)\Mozilla Firefox\firefox.exe"))) OR ((actor_process_image_path ~= "C:\\Users\\.*") AND (actor_process_image_path ~= ".*\\AppData\\Local\\Mozilla Firefox\\firefox.exe")) OR actor_process_image_path ~= "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\EdgeCore\\.*") AND (actor_process_image_path ~= ".*\\msedge.exe" OR  actor_process_image_path ~= ".*\\msedgewebview2.exe")) OR ((actor_process_image_path contains "C:\Program Files (x86)\Safari" OR  actor_process_image_path contains "C:\Program Files\Safari") AND (actor_process_image_path ~= ".*\\safari.exe")) OR data.name: Credential Manager Access By Uncommon Applications
data.description: Detects suspicious processes based on name and location that access the windows credential manager and vault, which can be a sign of credential stealing.

| filter event_type = 3
| filter (action_file_path contains "\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Credentials" OR  action_file_path contains "\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Credentials" OR  action_file_path contains "\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Vault" OR  action_file_path contains "\ProgramData\Microsoft\Vault") and not (((actor_process_image_path ~= "C:\\Program Files\\.*" OR  actor_process_image_path ~= "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\.*" OR  actor_process_image_path ~= "C:\\Windows\\system32\\.*" OR  actor_process_image_path ~= "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\.*")))

data.name: Access To Crypto Currency Wallets By Uncommon Applications

| fields agent_hostname, event_type, event_sub_type, actor_process_image_path, actor_process_os_pid, actor_process_image_md5, actor_process_signature_vendor, actor_process_signature_status, actor_effective_username, action_file_path

data.name: Unusual File Modification by dns.exe
data.description: Detects an unexpected file being modified by dns.exe which my indicate activity related to remote code execution or other forms of exploitation as seen in CVE-2020-1350 (SigRed).

data.name: Nslookup PowerShell Download Cradle
data.description: Detects a powershell download cradle using nslookup.
data.query_text:
dataset = xdr_data
| filter (event_type = 31 and event_sub_type = 10) or (event_type = 15 and action_evtlog_event_id IN (4104)) | alter script_data = if (event_type = 15, action_evtlog_message , to_string(dynamic_event_string_map))
| filter (script_data contains "powershell" AND  script_data contains "nslookup" AND  script_data contains "[1]") AND (script_data contains "-q=txt http" OR  script_data contains "-querytype=txt http")
| fields agent_hostname, event_type, event_sub_type, actor_process_image_path, actor_process_os_pid, actor_process_image_md5, actor_process_signature_vendor, actor_process_signature_status, actor_effective_username, script_data

dataset = xdr_data
| filter (event_type = 31 and event_sub_type = 10) or (event_type = 15 and action_evtlog_event_id IN (4104)) | alter script_data = if (event_type = 15, action_evtlog_message , to_string(dynamic_event_string_map))  | fields agent_hostname, event_type, event_sub_type, actor_process_image_path, actor_process_os_pid, actor_process_image_md5, actor_process_signature_vendor, actor_process_signature_status, actor_effective_username, script_data

data.name: PowerShell Downgrade Attack - PowerShell
data.description: Detects PowerShell downgrade attack by comparing the host versions with the actually used engine version 2.0.
data.query_text:
dataset = xdr_data
| filter (event_type = 31 and event_sub_type = 10) or (event_type = 15 and action_evtlog_event_id IN (4104)) | alter script_data = if (event_type = 15, action_evtlog_message , to_string(dynamic_event_string_map))
| filter (script_data contains "EngineVersion=2.") and not (script_data contains "HostVersion=2.")
| fields agent_hostname, event_type, event_sub_type, actor_process_image_path, actor_process_os_pid, actor_process_image_md5, actor_process_signature_vendor, actor_process_signature_status, actor_effective_username, script_data

| filter (((script_data contains "EngineVersion=2." OR  script_data contains "EngineVersion=4." OR  script_data contains "EngineVersion=5.")) AND ((script_data contains "HostVersion=3.")))
| fields agent_hostname, event_type, event_sub_type, actor_process_image_path, actor_process_os_pid, actor_process_image_md5, actor_process_signature_vendor, actor_process_signature_status, actor_effective_username, script_data

script_data contains "-DisableCatchupQuickScan 1" OR  script_data contains "-DisableIntrusionPreventionSystem $true" OR  script_data contains "-DisableIntrusionPreventionSystem 1" OR  script_data script_data contains "-DisableScanningNetworkFiles 1" OR  script_data contains "-DisableScriptScanning $true" OR  script_data contains "-DisableScriptScanning 1" OR  script_data contains "-MAPSReporting $false" OR  script_data contains "-MAPSReporting 0" OR  script_data contains "-drdsc $true" OR  script_data contains "-drdsc 1" OR  script_data contains "-drtm $true" OR  script_data script_data contains "htdefac Allow" OR  script_data contains "LowThreatDefaultAction Allow" OR  script_data contains "ltdefac Allow" OR  script_data contains "ModerateThreatDefaultAction Allow" OR  script_data contains "mtdefac Allow" OR  script_data contains "SevereThreatDefaultAction Allow" OR  script_data contains "stdefac Allow")))

data.name: Potential AMSI Bypass Script Using NULL Bits

| alter original_name = json_extract_scalar(action_process_file_info, "$.original_name")
| fields agent_hostname, event_type, event_sub_type, actor_process_image_path, actor_process_os_pid, actor_process_image_md5, actor_process_signature_vendor, actor_process_signature_status, actor_effective_username, action_process_cwd, action_process_image_sha256, action_process_image_md5, action_process_signature_product, action_process_image_auth_sha1, action_process_image_command_line, action_process_signature_vendor, action_process_integrity_level, action_process_username, action_process_image_path, actor_process_image_command_line, original_name

data.name: Suspicious File Downloaded From File-Sharing Website Via Certutil.EXE
data.description: Detects the execution of certutil with certain flags that allow the utility to download files from file-sharing websites.
data.query_text:
dataset = xdr_data
| filter event_type = 1 and event_sub_type = 1
| filter (((action_process_image_path ~= ".*\\certutil.exe") AND (json_extract_scalar(action_process_file_info, "$.original_name") IN ("CertUtil.exe"))) AND ((action_process_image_command_line contains "urlcache " OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "verifyctl ")) AND ((action_process_image_command_line contains ".githubusercontent.com" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "anonfiles.com" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "cdn.discordapp.com" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "ddns.net" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "dl.dropboxusercontent.com" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "ghostbin.co" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "glitch.me" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "gofile.io" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "hastebin.com" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "mediafire.com" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "mega.nz" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "onrender.com" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "pages.dev" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "paste.ee" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "pastebin.com" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "pastebin.pl" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "pastetext.net" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "privatlab.com" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "privatlab.net" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "send.exploit.in" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "sendspace.com" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "storage.googleapis.com" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "storjshare.io" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "supabase.co" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "temp.sh" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "transfer.sh" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "trycloudflare.com" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "ufile.io" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "w3spaces.com" OR  action_process_image_command_line contains "workers.dev")))
| alter original_name = json_extract_scalar(action_process_file_info, "$.original_name")
| fields agent_hostname, event_type, event_sub_type, actor_process_image_path, actor_process_os_pid, actor_process_image_md5, actor_process_signature_vendor, actor_process_signature_status, actor_effective_username, action_process_cwd, action_process_image_sha256, action_process_image_md5, action_process_signature_product, action_process_image_auth_sha1, action_process_image_command_line, action_process_signature_vendor, action_process_integrity_level, action_process_username, action_process_image_path, actor_process_image_command_line, original_name

data.name: K8_Endpoint_Data
data.query_text:
dataset = endpoints 
| filter cloud_info != null
| alter 
    // Cluster identification fields
    node_name = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.name"),
    k8_provider = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.cloud_provider"),
    vm_scale_set_name = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.vmScaleSetName"),
    k8_region = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.region"),
    geo_region = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.geo_region"),
    project_id = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.project_id"),
    sub_region = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.sub_region"),
    cluster_resource_suffix = arrayindex(regextract(json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.tags"),"aks-managed-resourceNameSuffix:([^;]+)"),0),
    node_pool_name = arrayindex(regextract(json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.tags"),"aks-managed-poolName:([^;]+)"),0),
    kubernetes_version = arrayindex(regextract(json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.tags"),"aks-managed-orchestrator:([^;]+)"),0),
    
    //Compute section
    vm_id = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.vmId"),
    vm_size = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.vmSize"),
    os_type = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.osType"),
    location = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.location"),
    version = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.version"),
    computer_name = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.osProfile.computerName"),
    admin_username = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.osProfile.adminUsername"),
    disable_password_auth = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.osProfile.disablePasswordAuthentication"),
    subscription_id = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.subscriptionId"),
    resource_group = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.resourceGroupName"),
    platform_fault_domain = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.platformFaultDomain"),
    platform_update_domain = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.platformUpdateDomain"),
    placement_group_id = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.placementGroupId"),
    azure_environment = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.azEnvironment"),
    
    // Storage profile section
    os_disk_name = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.storageProfile.osDisk.name"),
    os_disk_size_gb = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.storageProfile.osDisk.diskSizeGB"),
    os_disk_caching = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.storageProfile.osDisk.caching"),
    managed_disk_id = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.storageProfile.osDisk.managedDisk.id"),
    managed_disk_type = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.storageProfile.osDisk.managedDisk.storageAccountType"),
    image_reference_id = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.storageProfile.imageReference.id"),
    image_exact_version = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.storageProfile.imageReference.exactVersion"),
    
    // Network section
    mac_address = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.network.interface[0].macAddress"),
    subnet_address = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.network.interface[0].ipv4.subnet[0].address"),
    subnet_prefix = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.network.interface[0].ipv4.subnet[0].prefix"),

    virtual_tpm_enabled = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.securityProfile.virtualTpmEnabled"),
    
    // Tags as arrays
    tags = json_extract(cloud_info, "$.tags"),
    compute_tags_list = json_extract(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.tagsList"),
    
    // Resource ID
    resource_id = json_extract_scalar(cloud_info, "$.raw.compute.resourceId"),
    
    // Arrays as strings
    private_ips = json_extract(cloud_info, "$.private_ips"),
    public_ips = json_extract(cloud_info, "$.public_ips")

data.name: Azure Outpot Cost
data.query_text: dataset = azure_outpost_cost | fields ResourceID,ResourceType,ResourceLocation,ResourceGroupName,SubscriptionName,ServiceName,Meter,Tags,Cost

data.name: Azure Outpot Cost Export
data.query_text: dataset = azure_outpost_cost | fields ResourceID,ResourceType,ResourceLocation,ResourceGroupName,SubscriptionName,ServiceName,Meter,Tags,Cost | filter SubscriptionName = "CortexCloud"

data.name: Top Issue Sources in Last 7 Days
data.description: Counts the number of issues by Issue source in the last 7 days and displays them in descending order based on the count
data.query_text:
config timeframe = 7D
| dataset = issues
| comp count() as IssueSourceCount by xdm.issue.detection.method
| sort desc IssueSourceCount

data.name: Health Collection/Ingestion Issues
data.description: Lists the health and ingestion issues in the system to help monitor the status of data collectors and troubleshoot potential problems
data.query_text:
config timeframe = 30D
| dataset = issues
| filter xdm.issue.domain = "HEALTH"
| alter collector_name = regextract(xdm.issue.name  , "instance\s(.*)\sof\sa\s")
| alter collector_type = coalesce(arrayindex( regextract(xdm.issue.name  , "via\sa\s(.*)\scollector"),0),arrayindex( regextract(xdm.issue.name , "\sof\sa\s(\S+)"),0))
| fields _time, xdm.issue.id  , xdm.issue.detection.method , xdm.issue.name  , xdm.issue.description  , collector_name  , collector_type,*

data.name: Correlation Rules with the Highest Issue Count in Last 7 Days
data.description: Lists the correlation rules generating the most Issues in the last 7 days
data.query_text:
config timeframe = 7D
| dataset = issues
| fields xdm.issue.detection.rule_id , xdm.issue.name
|  join type = inner (dataset = correlations_auditing ) as join_issues join_issues.rule_id  = to_integer(xdm.issue.detection.rule_id )

data.name: Top Unresolved High Severity Cases
data.description: Filters for high/critical cases that requires immediate action
data.query_text:
dataset = cases
| filter xdm.case.platform_severity in("CRITICAL", "HIGH") and xdm.case.status_progress not contains "RESOLVED"
| fields xdm.case.id , xdm.case.platform_severity, xdm.case.status_progress , xdm.case.description  , _insert_time, xdm.case.score, xdm.case.assigned_to , *

data.name: Latest Unresolved Critical and High Severity Cases by Score
data.description: Lists the most recent high severity cases with the highest score
data.query_text:
dataset = cases
| filter xdm.case.platform_severity in("CRITICAL", "HIGH") and xdm.case.status_progress not contains "RESOLVED"
| fields xdm.case.id , xdm.case.platform_severity, xdm.case.status_progress , xdm.case.description  , _insert_time, xdm.case.score, xdm.case.assigned_to , *
| sort desc xdm.case.score

data.name: All Cases Sorted by Score
data.description: Lists cases sorted by the highest score
data.query_text:
dataset = cases
| fields xdm.case.id , xdm.case.platform_severity, xdm.case.status_progress , xdm.case.score, xdm.case.description ,_insert_time, *
| sort desc xdm.case.score

data.name: Unresolved Cases by Description
data.description: Filters for unresolved cases according to the description
data.query_text:
dataset = cases
| filter xdm.case.description in ($description) and xdm.case.status_progress not contains "RESOLVED"
| fields xdm.case.id , xdm.case.platform_severity, xdm.case.status_progress , xdm.case.description  , _insert_time, *

data.name: Unresolved Cases by Specified Score or Above
data.description: Filters for unresolved cases with a score equal to or above a specified threshold
data.query_text:
dataset = cases
| filter xdm.case.score >= to_number($score) and xdm.case.status_progress not contains "RESOLVED"
| fields xdm.case.id ,xdm.case.score, xdm.case.platform_severity, xdm.case.status_progress , xdm.case.description  , _insert_time,*

data.name: Unresolved Cases by Specified Score or Below
data.description: Filters for unresolved cases with a score equal to or below a specified threshold
data.query_text:
dataset = cases
| filter xdm.case.score <= to_number($score) and xdm.case.status_progress not contains "RESOLVED"
| fields xdm.case.id , xdm.case.score, xdm.case.platform_severity, xdm.case.status_progress , xdm.case.description  , _insert_time, *

data.name: Unresolved Cases by Assigned User
data.description: Lists unresolved cases that are assigned to a specified user
data.query_text:
dataset = cases
| filter xdm.case.assigned_to in ($assigned_user) and xdm.case.status_progress not contains "RESOLVED"
| fields xdm.case.id , xdm.case.platform_severity, xdm.case.status_progress, xdm.case.score, xdm.case.assigned_to , xdm.case.description  , _insert_time,*

data.name: Open Duration for High and Critical Cases
data.description: Lists unresolved cases with a high and critical severity, and details how long they have remained open in days
data.query_text:
dataset = cases
| filter xdm.case.platform_severity in("CRITICAL", "HIGH") and xdm.case.status_progress not contains "RESOLVED"
| alter open_duration = timestamp_diff(current_time(), _insert_time, "day")
| fields xdm.case.id , xdm.case.platform_severity, xdm.case.status_progress, open_duration
| sort desc open_duration

data.name: New and Unassigned Cases by Score
data.description: Lists new and unresolved cases by their score
data.query_text:
dataset = cases
| filter xdm.case.assigned_to=null and xdm.case.status_progress="New"
| sort desc xdm.case.score

data.name: CIE Computer Accounts
data.query_text: dataset = pan_dss_raw | filter type = "computer" | fields agent_id , display_name , dn , dns_host_name , domain_name , guid , last_logon_timestamp , last_modified_dc_record , location , member_of , name , netbios , netbios_and_sam_account_name , on_prem_dn_cn , on_prem_dn_domain , on_prem_dn_ou , on_prem_dn_raw , on_prem_extension_attributes , on_prem_last_sync , on_prem_sam_account_name , on_prem_sid , on_prem_sync_enabled , os , os_sp , os_ver , ou , primary_group_id , record_generated_time  , sam_account_name , security_groups , service_principal_names , sid , sid_history , sign_in_sessions_valid_from , source , trust_type , type , user_account_control

data.name: Yara Query
data.query_text: config timeframe = 1H | dataset = yara_scans_raw | fields active_workers , additional_data , alert_count_last_hour , api_endpoint , avg_processing_time_ms , cache_hit_rate , compilation_success_rate , cpu_percent , current_file , current_rate_files_per_sec , data , dateOfScan , detections_found , disk_io_mb , eff_cpu_efficiency , eff_io_intensity , eff_memory_efficiency , eff_network_intensity , elapsed_seconds , elapsed_time_formatted , elapsed_time_seconds , error_rate_percent , estimated_completion , eta_seconds , failed_rules_count , failed_rules_skipped , file_name , filename , files_processed , files_remaining , files_scanned , files_skipped , hit_rate_percent , hostname , ipAddress , ip_address , ip_addresses , junction_skips , level , log_type , logging_format , match , max_file_mb , max_workers , memory_mb , memory_usage_mb , message , metadata , monitoring_duration_minutes , net_recv_mb , net_sent_mb , net_total_mb , network_mb , offset , os_info , phase , platform , proc_cpu_percent , proc_file_descriptors , proc_io_read_mb , proc_io_write_mb , proc_memory_mb , proc_memory_percent , proc_thread_count , python_version , queue_size , rule , rule_id , rule_source , scan_id , scan_rate_files_per_sec , scan_rate_files_per_second , scan_start_time , scan_status , scan_targets , source , string , sys_cpu_percent , sys_disk_free_gb , sys_disk_total_gb , sys_disk_used_percent , sys_load_avg_15m , sys_load_avg_1m , sys_load_avg_5m , sys_memory_available_mb , sys_memory_total_mb , sys_memory_used_percent , timestamp_iso , total_detections , total_requests , trend_cpu_avg_10min , trend_cpu_trend , trend_data_points , trend_memory_avg_10min , trend_memory_trend , type , unique_real_paths , upload_enabled , upload_timestamp , uploader_version , valid_rules_compiled , valid_rules_count , yara_version

data.name: VM Instances with AI Packages
data.description: Lists all VM instances that have at least one AI package installed and shows the total AI package count per instance
data.query_text:
dataset = asset_inventory
| filter xdm.asset.type.category = "VM Instance"
| join type = inner (dataset = ai_packages | alter ts = to_timestamp(floor(scan_time), "MILLIS") | fields strong_id, related_asset_id, _name as package_name, _version as version, ts as scan_time, ai_categories, ai_technologies, package_manager, related_asset_provider | windowcomp row_number() by related_asset_id, strong_id sort desc scan_time as row_num | filter row_num = 1 | comp count() as ai_package_count by related_asset_id, related_asset_provider) as pkg pkg.related_asset_id = xdm.asset.id
| fields xdm.asset.id as asset_id, xdm.asset.name as asset_name, xdm.asset.type.category as asset_category, xdm.asset.type.name as asset_type, xdm.asset.provider as provider, xdm.asset.cloud.region as region, xdm.asset.first_observed as first_observed, ai_package_count

data.name: VM Instances with Vulnerable AI Packages
data.description: Lists all VM instances that have at least one AI package with an active vulnerability and shows the total vulnerability count per instance
data.query_text:
dataset = asset_inventory
| filter xdm.asset.type.category = "VM Instance"
| join type = inner (dataset = ai_packages | alter ts = to_timestamp(floor(scan_time), "MILLIS") | fields strong_id, related_asset_id, _name as package_name, _version as version, ts as scan_time, related_asset_provider | windowcomp row_number() by related_asset_id, strong_id sort desc scan_time as row_num | filter row_num = 1 | join type = inner (dataset = findings | filter xdm.finding.category = "VULNERABILITY" and xdm.finding.asset_class = "Compute" and xdm.finding.is_active = true | fields xdm.finding.asset_id as fnd_asset_id, xdm.software_package.id as fnd_package_name, xdm.software_package.version as fnd_version, xdm.vulnerability.severity as vuln_severity | comp count() as vuln_count by fnd_asset_id, fnd_package_name, fnd_version) as fnd fnd.fnd_asset_id = related_asset_id and lowercase(fnd.fnd_package_name) = lowercase(package_name) and fnd.fnd_version = version | comp sum(vuln_count) as total_vulnerabilities by related_asset_id, related_asset_provider) as pkg pkg.related_asset_id = xdm.asset.id
| fields xdm.asset.id as asset_id, xdm.asset.name as asset_name, xdm.asset.type.category as asset_category, xdm.asset.type.name as asset_type, xdm.asset.provider as provider, xdm.asset.cloud.region as region, xdm.asset.first_observed as first_observed, total_vulnerabilities

data.name: Running VM Instances with AI Packages
data.description: Lists all VM instances in Running state that have at least one AI package installed and shows the total AI package count per instance
data.query_text:
dataset = asset_inventory
| filter xdm.asset.type.category = "VM Instance"
| alter host_state = json_extract_scalar(xdm.asset.normalized_fields, "$['xdm.host.state']")
| filter host_state = "Running"
| join type = inner (dataset = ai_packages | alter ts = to_timestamp(floor(scan_time), "MILLIS") | fields strong_id, related_asset_id, _name as package_name, _version as version, ts as scan_time, ai_categories, ai_technologies, package_manager, related_asset_provider | windowcomp row_number() by related_asset_id, strong_id sort desc scan_time as row_num | filter row_num = 1 | comp count() as ai_package_count by related_asset_id, related_asset_provider) as pkg pkg.related_asset_id = xdm.asset.id
| fields xdm.asset.id as asset_id, xdm.asset.name as asset_name, xdm.asset.type.category as asset_category, xdm.asset.type.name as asset_type, xdm.asset.provider as provider, xdm.asset.cloud.region as region, xdm.asset.first_observed as first_observed, host_state, ai_package_count

data.name: Base Images with AI Packages
data.description: Lists all base container images that have at least one AI package installed and shows the total AI package count per image
data.query_text:
dataset = asset_inventory
| filter xdm.asset.type.category = "Container Image"
| alter is_base_image = uppercase(coalesce(json_extract_scalar(xdm.asset.raw_fields, "$.CWP.is_base_image"), "false"))
| filter is_base_image = "TRUE"
| join type = inner (dataset = ai_packages | alter ts = to_timestamp(floor(scan_time), "MILLIS") | fields strong_id, related_asset_id, _name as package_name, _version as version, ts as scan_time, ai_categories, ai_technologies, package_manager, related_asset_provider | windowcomp row_number() by related_asset_id, strong_id sort desc scan_time as row_num | filter row_num = 1 | comp count() as ai_package_count by related_asset_id, related_asset_provider) as pkg pkg.related_asset_id = xdm.asset.id
| fields xdm.asset.id as asset_id, xdm.asset.name as asset_name, xdm.asset.type.category as asset_category, xdm.asset.type.name as asset_type, xdm.asset.provider as provider, xdm.asset.cloud.region as region, xdm.asset.first_observed as first_observed, is_base_image, ai_package_count
